name: Jimmy Savile: A British Horror Story
original_name: Jimmy Savile: A British Horror Story
overview: Jimmy Savile was one of the United Kingdom’s most beloved TV personalities. Shortly after his death in 2011, an investigation prompted more than 450 horrific allegations of sexual assault and abuse, with victims as young as 5.

trailers.title: Who Was Jimmy Savile? How Did He Get Away With It For So Long?
